evidence.snippet: Meller Optics Designed prototype sapphire internal optics for newly developed IR Missile Technology.
Meller Optics manufactured the windows for the Tomahawk missiles navigation systems, as well as the internal sapphire optics for the stinger missile.

items.notes: Sapphire domes, windows, and lenses are used in EO/IR seeker/sensor systems for defense applications. History includes optics for IR missile seekers, Tomahawk navigation systems, stinger missile, and ASRAAM missile.

evidence.snippet: *   [CUSTOM LIDAR OPTICS SUPPORT MISSION-CRITICAL PERFORMANCE](https://melleroptics.com/custom-lidar-optics-support-mission-critical-performance/ "CUSTOM LIDAR OPTICS SUPPORT MISSION-CRITICAL PERFORMANCE") Comments Off on CUSTOM LIDAR OPTICS SUPPORT MISSION-CRITICAL PERFORMANCE

items.notes: News headline references custom LIDAR optics for mission-critical performance, indicating they supply optics for LIDAR navigation sensors.

products_categories.notes: Meller Optics makes precision sapphire optical components (windows, domes, lenses) used in EO/IR sensor systems and LIDAR for aerospace/defense applications including UAS. Their products go into ISR payloads as components, and they also supply LIDAR optics for navigation. The external seed categorised them as structures_materials/Optics, but their components are more directly inputs to ISR payloads and navigation sensors than to airframes.

evidence.snippet:
Meller Optics, Inc.
120 Corliss Street
Providence, RI 02904

Meller Optics, Inc.
120 Corliss Street
Providence, RI 02904

Recognized for our custom fabrication capabilities since 1921, Meller Optics has consistently delivered high precision optics for critical applications in the aerospace, defense, electro-optics, medical instrumentation, process control, robotics, and industrial markets.

Our custom fabrication capabilities include the manufacture of tight-tolerance optics of all kinds, utilizing a full range of ultraviolet, visible, and infrared materials. In addition to providing our standard, off-the-shelf products, we take delicate, difficult to work with optical materials and fabricate functional components that meet your exacting specifications.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Meller Optics fabricates precision optical components (sapphire windows, domes, lenses, prisms) sold to OEMs and integrators for use in EO/IR sensors, LIDAR systems, and other electro-optical assemblies. They do not make complete systems.

ndaa.notes: Site claims DFARS/NIST compliant and Made in USA, but does not explicitly mention NDAA Section 848/889 compliance.

evidence.snippet: Orders typically ship in 3-5 days. Please call the factory for expedited delivery or quantity discounts.

readiness.notes: Stock products available with online shop, standard lead time of 3-5 days, with quantity discounts and expedited options. Products offered in tiered quality grades indicating serial production.

tagline: Precision sapphire optics fabricator (windows, domes, lenses, prisms, substrates) for EO/IR and defense sensor applications. In production since 1921; ITAR-registered, ISO 9001:2015, DFARS/NIST compliant, US-made. NDAA and Blue UAS status not publicly disclosed. No major primes' contracts or programs identified in public record.
